message:
fix: use POSIX-compliant df output in ubuntu_emergency_cleanup

Add -P flag to df for portable output format across different systems.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1096,7 +1096,7 @@ ubuntu_emergency_cleanup() {
 
     # Report remaining space
     local available
-    available=$(df -h / | awk 'NR==2 {print $4}')
+    available=$(df -hP / | awk 'NR==2 {print $4}')
     log_detail "Available space after cleanup: $available"
 }
